title: Codonoprasum flexifolium
taxonomy: Codonoprasum flexifolium is classified as a member of the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It belongs to the genus Codonoprasum, which includes various species of plants. This classification places it within the order Apiales, a group of flowering plants characterized by their umbrella-like inflorescences. Further, it is grouped under the subclass Rosidae and the class Magnoliopsida. The full classification of Codonoprasum flexifolium is still a subject of ongoing research and might be updated as more information becomes available.
